# Changelog

## Version 0.2.0
* Upgraded CLI and tests to .NET 10 (GeoRaptor still supports netstandard2.0)
* Fixed minimum precision bug
* Improved performance (8-10x faster and 8-20x less memory allocation)
* Added benchmark project

## Version 0.1.1
* Added command line options to include headers in the output as well as specifying the separator character(s)
* Added automatically generated markdown code documentation with vsxmd

## Version 0.1.0
* First version
